summary: Frontend testing for new Service Detail pages (6 slugs). All requested checks pass: clickable service cards, full hero/ideas/deliverables/pain-points/related-projects/FAQ/CTA/next-service rendering, invalid slug redirect to /#services, navbar scroll-back to home sections, mobile single-column ideas grid with no horizontal scroll, sticky WhatsApp visible, no console errors. Previous routes (/, /work/:id, /previews) still work.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Deliverables count varies per service in servicesContent.js — websites/ai-automation/app-dev have 6, ad-management/social-media/creative-studio have 5. Review request stated deliverable-0..5 (6 cards) but actual content is 5 for three services. Not a bug — just a content choice. If 6 were expected, add one more deliverable item to those three services.

Sticky WhatsApp link is detected via href*='wa.me' fallback — consider adding a stable data-testid='sticky-whatsapp' to /app/frontend/src/components/site/StickyWhatsApp.jsx for cleaner future testing.
ServiceDetail.jsx is 326 lines — fine, but if it grows, consider splitting hero/ideas/related into subcomponents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service detail flow fully validated against review_request. data-testid pattern for service detail is `service-detail-{slug}` (the request mentioned `service-detail-portfolio-showcase-1710` which appears to be a template-substitution typo of the host name). All 6 slugs render expected idea counts: websites=8, ai-automation=9, app-dev=8, ad-management=6, social-media=6, creative-studio=6. Related project links and next-service cycle verified.
